name: prowl-mcp
description: Advanced Xcode Integration for AI Agents — zero-config workspace jailing, smart scheme discovery, and live-streaming build/test progress directly to your chat interface.

default_scheme.title: Default scheme
default_scheme.description: Scheme to use for build_project/run_tests when you don't specify one in the prompt (e.g. Soothesenses-Development). Optional.

default_destination.title: Default test destination
default_destination.description: xcodebuild -destination string used by run_tests when none is given (e.g. platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16). Optional — falls back to iPhone 16 simulator.
